---
title: "Talks & Policy"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

## Policy engagement

[May 2025]{.when} **Invited roundtable speaker**, Lauterpacht Centre for International Law, Cambridge — legal frameworks for climate and biodiversity policy

[May 2025]{.when} **Expert contributor**, *Co-design the Future(s) of Payments for Ecosystem Services in the EU* — stakeholder workshop on EU PES scheme design

[April 2025]{.when} **Invited panellist**, ThinkForest: *Ask a Scientist — Carbon Farming in the European Forest Sector* — science–policy panel on carbon farming implementation

[October 2024]{.when} **Invited expert**, ThinkForest: *What Do We Know About Carbon Farming*, Permanent Representation of Austria to the EU, Brussels — presented Chiti et al. (2024) to EU Commission officials; roundtable on the EU Carbon Removals Certification Framework

## Conference presentations

[Sept. 2026]{.when} **XXVII Annual BIOECON Conference**, St John's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation

[June–July 2026]{.when} **7th World Congress of Environmental and Resource Economists (WCERE)**, Nova School of Business and Economics, Cascais — oral presentation

[March 2026]{.when} **3rd European Carbon Farming Summit**, Padua — oral presentation

[June 2025]{.when} **International Symposium on Climate, Finance and Sustainability (ISCFS)**, Paris — oral presentation

[October 2024]{.when} **LabEx ARBRE Day**, INRAE Champenoux, Nancy — oral presentation

[Sept. 2024]{.when} **XXV Annual BIOECON Conference**, King's College, University of Cambridge — oral presentation

[July 2024]{.when} **26th IUFRO World Congress**, Stockholm — poster

[June 2024]{.when} **8th Workshop on Non-Market Valuation (WONV)**, University of Leeds — oral presentation

[June 2024]{.when} **2nd Action versus Inaction Facing Climate Change (AICC) Conference**, Strasbourg — poster

[June 2023]{.when} **28th Annual Conference of the European Association of Environmental and Resource Economists (EAERE)**, Limassol — oral presentation

## Seminars

[June 2025]{.when} **Research seminar**, Centre for Environment, Energy and Natural Resource Governance (C-EENRG), University of Cambridge

## Teaching

[Nov. 2024]{.when} **Regulation of Ecosystem Services — Market-Based Instruments and Payments for Ecosystem Services**, AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy

[Nov. 2024]{.when} **Introduction to Stated Preference Methods for Ecosystem Services Valuation**, AgroParisTech, MSc Forests and their Environment (FEN), Nancy
